title: Wholesome Canadian Porcini Risotto
description: A winey, chewy risotto infused with rehydrated porcini mushrooms and char-grilled vegetables, crafted for midnight cravings and anti-inflammatory comfort.

ingredients.name: dried porcini mushrooms
ingredients.notes: reconstitute in warm water for 20 min

instructions: Rehydrate the dried porcini mushrooms in warm water for 20 minutes, then strain and reserve the liquid.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and sauté the diced onion, carrot, and minced garlic until translucent and fragrant.
Add the arborio rice to the skillet, stirring until each grain is lightly toasted and coated with oil.
Pour in the dry white wine, letting it reduce while stirring constantly until the liquid is fully absorbed by the rice.
Begin adding the vegetable broth one ladle at a time, stirring frequently; when most of the liquid is absorbed, pour in a splash of the reserved porcini liquid.
Continue adding broth gradually and stirring until the rice is creamy and al dente, about 18 minutes total.
Stir in the butter, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper, adjusting seasoning to taste.
Serve the risotto hot, garnished with extra parsley if desired.
